read_only_paths: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md

instruction_summary: Advance issue #88 by implementing a first ZIP import slice on top of the existing import dry-run/importer pipeline: receive a ZIP through internal API, expand it into staging safely, derive a manifest/preview, persist a ZIP-mode dry-run, and allow confirmed execution from the saved artifact without adding a user-facing UI yet.
actual_work: Implemented the first ZIP import slice on top of the existing manifest-based importer pipeline. Added ZIP staging/extraction, document scanning, manifest generation, an internal ZIP import API with saved dry-run and confirmed execution flow, importer/dry-run target resolution alignment, focused service/request specs, and application-spec documentation updates.

docker compose run --rm app bundle exec rspec spec/services/zip_import_document_scanner_spec.rb spec/services/zip_import_stager_spec.rb spec/requests/api/internal/zip_imports_spec.rb

quality_notes: Added focused service specs for ZIP scanning and staging and a request spec for validate-only and confirmed ZIP import flows.
Separated ZIP preview leftovers into `orphan_files` and `skipped_files` so noisy ZIP metadata entries do not appear as importable leftovers.
risks: Focused RSpec verification could not be completed end-to-end in this environment because the local Ruby toolchain is absent and the Docker-based run did not return test output promptly.
The initial ZIP scanner intentionally supports Markdown/MDX and standalone diagram sources only; richer bundle conventions and more aggressive frontmatter parsing remain future work.
remaining_concerns: A follow-up validation pass in CI or a healthier local container environment is still needed before merging.

signals.note: Created the repo-local prompt log during the initial scoping phase for issue #88 before implementation.
